response.objective_caption: A shirtless young man wearing baggy blue jeans, black sneakers with red laces, and a black cap lies curled on his side on a sloped concrete embankment. A skateboard with red wheels and a blue deck rests on the ground near his feet. Behind him, white painted or chalk lettering spelling "FUCK MAN" appears on the concrete surface. Dry grass and debris are visible along the top edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A shirtless young man wearing baggy blue jeans, black sneakers with red laces, and a black cap lies curled on his side on a sloped concrete embankment, his posture and expression conveying exhaustion and distress. A skateboard with red wheels rests near his feet, and white lettering spelling "FUCK MAN" appears on the concrete behind him. The image has the candid, unplanned energy of an amateur snapshot, captured with visible film grain and a muted, faded color palette that amplifies the atmospheric distress of the scene.
